ohtani.title: Kyle Tucker's four RBIs fuels Dodgers' 15-3 win
ohtani.blurb: Kyle Tucker collects four RBIs and the Dodgers score nine runs in the top of the 6th in their 15-3 win over the Padres

imanaga.title: Dansby Swanson's four RBIs aids Cubs' win
imanaga.blurb: Dansby Swanson collects four RBIs in the Cubs' 10-5 victory over the Mets

suzuki.title: Ian Happ's three-run homer surges Cubs past Brewers
suzuki.blurb: Seiya Suzuki hits a two-run home run and Ian Happ drills a three-run homer to lead the Cubs past the Brewers, 8-2

yoshida.title: Seigler, Yoshida both homer in Red Sox 4-1 win
yoshida.blurb: Anthony Seigler and Masataka Yoshida both hit home runs as the Red Sox earn a 4-1 win over the Yankees

okamoto.title: Quantrill, five-run 5th inning lead Rangers to win
okamoto.blurb: Cal Quantrill's scoreless outing and a five-run 5th inning lead the Rangers to a 7-4 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Ty France hits three-run home run in Padres' win
matsui.blurb: Ty France hits a three-run home run and Walker Buehler strikes out five batters in the Padres' 7-1 victory over the Dodgers
